caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt, a green baseball cap, and black over-ear headphones speaks into a black microphone. His green shirt features the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" across the chest. He is positioned in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio, with framed photos on the wall behind him and a white mannequin wearing a white shirt in the background. A clothing rack is visible further back. Small logos appear at the bottom of the scene, including a circular one containing the text "SHIT" and another with red cursive text reading "Really Hot". As the man speaks, his facial expressions shift slightly, and his mouth opens and closes as he communicates. The camera remains static throughout the sequence, capturing his head and shoulders in a medium close-up shot.
